overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic cyberpunk urban underpass. The scene transitions from a covered walkway with neon billboards and graffiti into a dark concrete tunnel, then emerges into a sunlit underpass beneath elevated highways with steam vents and passing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with adjacent road under overpass

events.description: moving from the green-tiled walkway onto the asphalt road entering the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward along the covered walkway, passing neon billboards and graffiti-covered walls on the right

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements with food imagery hanging from the overpass ceiling
concrete wall covered in colorful red and blue graffiti tags
dark colored sedan parked along the left curb
vertical traffic signal pole showing red light
massive concrete and metal overhead bridge structure with geometric supports

segments.scene_description: The clip begins on a green-tiled pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass. Neon billboards hang overhead on the left while a graffiti-covered concrete wall runs along the right. A parked car sits on the left side of the road as the camera moves forward, transitioning from the walkway onto the asphalt road leading into a dark tunnel ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete tunnel with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: proceeding straight through the tunnel toward the bright exit visible in the distance

entered.detail: dark concrete walls with horizontal ridges and industrial texture
linear fluorescent light fixtures running along the tunnel ceiling
metal safety barriers along the right wall of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Now deep inside the tunnel, the environment becomes darker and fully enclosed by concrete walls. Artificial ceiling lights provide greenish illumination as the camera moves steadily forward. The tunnel walls create a narrow corridor leading toward a bright exit visible far ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit transition with steam vents

events.description: approaching the tunnel exit, bright daylight creates strong backlighting ahead
silver sedan passes by on the right side heading toward the exit

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the tunnel opens up, approaching the bright exit with steam visible on the sides

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past the camera toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: white steam or smoke rising from ground vents on the right side
bright daylight streaming through the tunnel exit opening

segments.scene_description: The tunnel gradually brightens as the exit approaches, with intense daylight creating a silhouette effect ahead. Steam rises from vents on the right side of the road. A silver sedan overtakes on the right and drives ahead toward the opening, while the concrete walls recede into the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass intersection beneath elevated highways

events.description: exiting the tunnel into the open underpass area with visible sky and city buildings
steam vents become more prominent on the right side of the underpass

agents.ego_description: moving through the underpass intersection with steam rising around, approaching the open street and city buildings ahead

entered.detail: multi-level concrete highway structure with massive support pillars
futuristic skyscrapers and urban structures visible in the distance
low concrete dividers along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the tunnel into a sunlit underpass beneath massive elevated highways. Steam billows from vents on the right while futuristic city buildings rise in the distance ahead. The environment opens up significantly, revealing crosswalk markings and traffic signals at the intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit pedestrian walkway through a dark concrete tunnel and into a bright, expansive urban underpass. It begins on a green-tiled path beneath a massive overpass, moving past hanging billboards and graffiti-covered walls before transitioning onto an asphalt road that leads into a dark tunnel. As the camera moves deeper into the enclosed space, the environment shifts to a narrow corridor illuminated by greenish artificial ceiling lights. The scene then brightens as the camera approaches the exit, passing rising steam vents and a silver sedan that overtakes on the right. Finally, the camera emerges into intense daylight beneath towering elevated highways, where the view opens up to reveal futuristic city buildings and traffic signals at a distant intersection.
